OverviewTutorialsGetting StartedAI &amp; LLM Intelligence DocumentationLLM Intelligence GuideCortex: Master Architecture DocumentAgentsSkillsModel OptimizationCommand ReferenceAI Intelligence Features

Agent Catalog

Complete reference for current claude-ctx agents, organized by category with model assignments and quick summaries.

Overview

Total Agents: 19

Model Distribution: 8 Sonnet, 2 Opus, 9 Haiku

Auto-Activation: Enabled via agents/triggers.yaml (adjust in the TUI or edit triggers directly)

Categories

Category Count Notes
infrastructure 4 Cloud, IaC, deploy, and platform architecture
meta-orchestration 4 Planning, memory, and coordination
documentation 3 Diagrams, tutorials, and learning guides
quality-security 3 Review, refinement, and security auditing
developer-experience 2 Debugging and DX improvements
language-specialists 2 Python and TypeScript specialists
data-ai 2 SQL, prompts, and knowledge synthesis

Agent Index

Agent Category Model Summary
cloud-architect infrastructure sonnet Designs secure, scalable, and cost-aware cloud architectures across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
code-reviewer quality-security sonnet Senior reviewer focused on safety, reliability, and maintainability of code and configuration changes.
debugger developer-experience sonnet Root-cause analyst for runtime failures, regressions, and flaky behavior.
deployment-engineer infrastructure haiku Automates CI/CD pipelines, container builds, and cloud deployment workflows with zero-downtime guardrails.
dx-optimizer developer-experience haiku Developer Experience specialist focused on reducing friction and automating workflows.
knowledge-synthesizer meta-orchestration sonnet Extracts patterns from multi-agent activity to build shared intelligence and best practices.
kubernetes-architect infrastructure haiku Builds GitOps-driven Kubernetes platforms with service mesh, observability, and multi-cluster resilience.
learning-guide documentation haiku Education-focused guide for explaining concepts and building learning paths.
memory-keeper meta-orchestration sonnet Guardian of the memory vault; ensures knowledge, fixes, and sessions are recorded and retrieved.
mermaid-expert documentation haiku Mermaid diagram specialist delivering clear, professional visualizations for docs and systems.
orchestrator meta-orchestration opus High-level planner that breaks down complex goals and delegates to sub-agents (Orchestrator-Workers).
prompt-engineer data-ai opus Optimizes prompts for LLMs and generates synthetic test data for validation.
python-pro language-specialists haiku Production-grade Python engineer for performant, testable, and secure codebases.
refiner quality-security sonnet Iterative improvement specialist using the Evaluator-Optimizer pattern to polish code and docs.
security-auditor quality-security sonnet Evaluates applications for vulnerabilities, auth flows, and compliance against security benchmarks.
sql-pro data-ai sonnet Writes, optimizes, and debugs complex SQL queries for Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite.
terraform-specialist infrastructure haiku Automates infrastructure with reusable Terraform modules, safe state handling, and CI/CD integration.
tutorial-engineer documentation haiku Tutorial engineering specialist for hands-on learning experiences.
typescript-pro language-specialists haiku TypeScript specialist for strict typing, DX optimization, and enterprise-scale architecture.

Activation and Management

  • TUI: claude-ctx tui then press 2 for Agents. Use Space to toggle and Enter for details.
  • CLI: claude-ctx agent list, claude-ctx agent activate <name>, claude-ctx agent deactivate <name>.
  • Dependencies: use claude-ctx agent deps <name> to see recommended or required agents.

Source of Truth

Agent definitions live in agents/*.md. Update frontmatter to change model preferences, triggers, dependencies, and tags.

Cortex

  • Cortex

    Comprehensive context management plugin for Claude Code
